subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we appreciate your interest in exploring a collaboration with our team. We'd be happy to set up an introductory call.

Here are some time slots that work well on our end:
- April 21, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- April 22, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- April 23, 2026 at 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which slot works best for you, and we'll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm afraid I can't share internal contact information. However, you can find our public team information on our website, and we'd be glad to facilitate introductions to the right people once we've had our initial conversation.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
